productDisplayName: Nike Women Steady VIII White Casual Shoe
description: Super light-weight and extremely attractive, these Steady VIII cross trainers from nike give you the kind of all-day comfort that your feet truly deserve. Excellent for all your Sports endevours and casual wear as well. Just be prepared for all the jealous glances you get! Upper Synthetic upper for durability and style Mesh panels on the side for improved breathability Synthetic overlays for added structure and style Perforations on the forefoot for better ventilation Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lushly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue Brand name appliqued on collar nike Swoosh embossed on both sides and on forefoot Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and support Well cushioned footbed for all day comfort Mesh lining for increased ventilation Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Flex grooves for ease of movement Diamond pattern grooves for improved traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
